title: After Life WoW
description: Make the death/soul form mechanics from WoW in minecraft
body:
**The goal of the mod:**

  Make the death/soul form mechanics from WoW in minecraft.

**How it's working:**

- When you die it make a dead body and you become a soul.
- Others can see your soul floatting on your way back to it.
- When near it you get a popup that tells you how to ressurect.
  
**In ghost form:**

- You can fly like in creative.
- You can pass through thin walls if you hold the spirit orb that is given in ghost form.
- Can't open any container (Everything that has a GUI).
- Can't hit any mobs.
- If you are stuck somewhere sneak a few second to get back to your last respawn point.
- You can revive in 3 ways :
   - Get back to your dead body
   - Press the give up key and you'll get back to your last respawn point (must be in the overworld) and get penalities for doing so.
   - Get to a graveyard, resurrect and get penalities for doing so.

**Few settings/commands:**

- Added the gamerule corpsX, corpsY and corpsZ. You can ajust the placement of your dead body when you die if it's not at the right place.
- Added a give up keybind ("End" by default)  if you decide not to get back to your corps.
- Added a keybind ("Delete" by default) to stop the background music in soul form.
- Added a gamerule xpOnDeath, false by default. Make the player keep his xp after death but lose it overtime until he revive.
- Added a gamerule xpDecaySetting, 10 by default. You can set the speed (in tick) on how fast you lose xp while you're dead.
- Added a gamerule spawnDeadBody, Skeleton body (Default 0), Orb (1), None (-1). Block that spawn on death.
- Added a gamerule giveUpEnable is a true or false and it makes the give up option ON or OFF (true by default).
- Added a gamerule giveUpEffectEnable is a true or false and it makes the give up option have penalties or not (true by default).
- Added a gamerule spiritItemDisable to toggle if you get the spirit item on death. (False by default)

**Player config menu (HOME key):** 

- On/Off for the blue filter.
- On/Off for the music playing while in ghost form.
- Option for death sound. (Male, female or none.)
  
**Potion config menu (INSERT key (Need OP level 4 to be able to open it)):** 

- Can have up to 3 different potion effect simultaneously
- Can configure how long they last and how strong they are.
- Can set when you'll be able to use a milk bucket.
- By default you'll have slowness, mining fatigue, weakness and ressurection sickness for 1 minute.

**Structures:**

- There is a graveyard stucture that appears every so often.
    - There is 4 variant of graveyard. 
    - One for grass biomes, one for sand biomes, one for snow biomes and one red sand/terracotta biomes.
    - You can revive there but like in WoW you will get temporary penalities for doing so. (same effect as the give up option)
  
**Achievements:**

- There are custom achievements.
  
**Sound volume ajustement:**

- The ghost form music volume can be ajusted in the ambient slider in the sound menu.
- The death sound volume can be ajusted in the player slider in the sound menu.

**Gravestones like mods compatibility:**

- Should work with all of them. I have tested few of the most downloaded one and they all worked.

**Know incompatible mods and temporary fixes if there is one:**

- Better Invisibility: Turn off the death music while in soul form.
- Secrets of Daregorn: Not supported.
